sentences.text: Thank you for calling Avenue Partners. If you know, the extension of the person you are trying to reach you may dial it at any time. If you are a vendor interested in new business with Avenue to press one to hear our staff directory by name press two for accounting press three for investor relations press four for land acquisition press five for information about sales or leasing at one of our communities press six for a job inquiries with our corporate team or community change press seven for all other requests press eight. Thank you for calling Avenue unit Partners. If you know the extension of the person you are trying to reach you may dial it at any time. This is Courtney.
